blockers.finding: Production scoring (falcon_score.py) loads features_v02.parquet, NOT features_v04_1.parquet. V0.4.0 validation uses new data but production scoring is not updated.
blockers.impact: Production scoring uses old data with 0% fundamental factor coverage for 2025-2026
blockers.recommendation: Update falcon_score.py to use features_v04_1.parquet before deploying V0.4.0 to production

blockers.finding: 13 fundamental factors have 0% coverage in 2025-2026 data, including critical factors: grossProfitMargin, netProfitMargin, operatingProfitMargin, ebitdaMargin, debtToEquityRatio, eps_revision, revenue_revision, num_analysts_eps, eps_dispersion
blockers.evidence: Year-by-year analysis shows these factors drop to 0% starting 2025
blockers.impact: These factors are missing from recent data, but the validation script uses r_ prefix versions which have 99.7% coverage in 2025-2026
blockers.recommendation: The r_ prefix versions are available and have good coverage. Confirm these are the correct factors being used in production.

warnings.finding: 144 out of 156 columns (92.3%) have some missing values
warnings.evidence: 11 columns have >50% missing: eps_dispersion (71.7%), netProfitMargin_qoq (71.0%), fmp_covered (71.0%), etc.
warnings.impact: Missing values may affect factor calculations for some tickers
warnings.recommendation: Review if missing data is systematic (e.g., FMP coverage gaps) or data quality issues

warnings.impact: Infinite values may cause numerical issues in factor calculations
warnings.recommendation: Replace inf values with NaN or clip to finite values

warnings.finding: 141 out of 156 columns (90.4%) have extreme values (z-score > 5)
warnings.impact: Extreme values may distort percentile rankings
warnings.recommendation: Consider winsorization or capping extreme values before ranking

passes.finding: Data file exists and is readable
passes.evidence: Shape: 1,234,580 rows × 156 columns, 476 tickers

passes.finding: Date range covers 2016-01-04 to 2026-06-26 (10.5 years)
passes.evidence: 2,635 unique dates, full SPX universe coverage

passes.finding: 2025-2026 fundamental factor coverage: 98.9% (as reported)
passes.evidence: 176,525 rows in 2025-2026, 476 unique tickers

passes.finding: No duplicate ticker-date combinations
passes.evidence: df.duplicated(subset=['ticker', 'date']).sum() = 0

passes.finding: No negative close prices
passes.evidence: (df['close'] < 0).sum() = 0

warnings.finding: r_ prefix factors are raw values, not percentile ranks. The script computes percentile ranks during scoring.
warnings.impact: The naming convention (r_ prefix) may be misleading - r_ appears to mean 'ratio' or 'raw', not 'rank'
warnings.recommendation: Document the naming convention clearly to avoid confusion

warnings.finding: Some factors have very extreme raw values before ranking
warnings.impact: Extreme raw values may affect ranking if not properly handled
warnings.recommendation: Verify that the ranking function handles extreme values correctly

passes.finding: All 39 scoring factors exist in the data
passes.evidence: 20 fund_ratio factors + 19 fund_metric factors, all present in features_v04_1.parquet

passes.finding: Scoring factor coverage in 2025-2026: 99.7% mean
No forward-looking columns detected
passes.evidence: No columns with names containing 'future', 'fwd', 'next', 'target', 'label'

passes.finding: PIT consistency: Fundamental factors have data from 2016-01-04 for all tickers
passes.evidence: AAPL/grossProfitMargin first valid date: 2016-01-04, MSFT/grossProfitMargin first valid date: 2016-01-04

passes.finding: Factor computation logic is correct (ret5 matches manual calculation)
passes.evidence: AAPL/ret5 consistency: max diff = 0.000000

passes.finding: Cross-sectional ranking is properly computed per date
passes.evidence: Script uses scipy.stats.rankdata with method='average', computes percentile ranks [0,1]

passes.finding: FLIP_FACTORS correctly identifies factors where lower is better
passes.evidence: 14 factors correctly flipped: r_priceToEarningsRatio, r_debtToEquityRatio, m_netDebtToEBITDA, etc.

blockers.finding: Rank Inversion test FAILED: only 42.1% of windows passed (8/19)
blockers.impact: Model cannot reliably distinguish good stocks from bad stocks
blockers.recommendation: Do not use V0.4.0 for production scoring. Consider V0.3.1 which has better rank inversion performance.

blockers.finding: Model does NOT beat baseline (equal-weight top-10)
blockers.evidence: Mean model Sharpe: 1.306, Mean baseline Sharpe: 1.486. Model beats baseline in only 6/19 windows.
blockers.impact: Complex V0.4.0 model underperforms simple equal-weight strategy
blockers.recommendation: Stick with V0.3.1 (simple ranking with fixed weights) which has WF Sharpe 1.431

warnings.evidence: Sharpe range: -1.918 to 3.583, 3 windows with negative Sharpe
warnings.impact: Performance is inconsistent across market regimes
warnings.recommendation: Consider regime-adaptive strategies or reduce position sizing during high-volatility periods

warnings.finding: MaxDD of -28.87% is within acceptable range but on the higher side
warnings.impact: Significant capital at risk during market stress
warnings.recommendation: Consider tighter stop-loss or position limits during market stress

warnings.finding: Sharpe std calculation has minor discrepancy
warnings.impact: Minor reporting issue, does not affect conclusions
warnings.recommendation: Clarify whether std is population or sample std

passes.finding: Walk-Forward Sharpe of 1.306 exceeds minimum threshold of 1.0
passes.evidence: WF Sharpe: 1.306, Mean of window sharpes: 1.306 (verified)

passes.finding: Win Rate of 60.8% is acceptable
passes.evidence: 60.8% of trades are profitable

passes.finding: CAGR of 23% is strong
passes.evidence: Annual compound growth rate: 23%

passes.finding: All 19 Walk-Forward windows completed successfully
passes.evidence: failed_windows: 0, n_windows: 19

passes.finding: Factor IC analysis shows most factors have statistically significant IC
passes.evidence: 30 factors analyzed, all have |t-stat| > 3.0

blockers.finding: V0.4.0 weight configuration differs significantly from V0.3.1 production config
blockers.evidence: V0.3.1: fund_ratio=0.70, analyst=0.20, fund_metric=0.10 | V0.4.0: fund_ratio=0.70, fund_metric=0.15, log_metric=0.15
blockers.impact: V0.4.0 removes analyst factor (was 20% weight), adds log_metric (new)
blockers.recommendation: Verify if removing analyst factor is intentional and beneficial

warnings.finding: log_metric = log(fund_metric + 1) may have numerical issues
warnings.evidence: fund_metric values can be negative (r_ prefix factors have negative values), log of negative+1 may be undefined
warnings.impact: NaN values in log_metric could affect scoring
warnings.recommendation: Add validation to ensure fund_metric > -1 before log transformation

warnings.finding: Median fill for missing values may introduce bias
warnings.evidence: Script uses median_by_date then global_median as fallback
warnings.impact: Missing fundamental data is replaced with cross-sectional median, which may not be representative
warnings.recommendation: Consider using forward-fill for time-series data or industry-specific medians

passes.finding: Scoring script exists and is functional
passes.evidence: falcon_score.py (626 lines) loads data, computes ranks, outputs scored JSON

passes.finding: Output format is compatible with downstream trading scripts
passes.evidence: Scored JSON format matches alpaca_trade.py expectations

passes.finding: Top-N selection logic is correct
passes.evidence: Script selects top_n=10 stocks by composite score

blockers.finding: Data inconsistency: Production scoring uses features_v02.parquet, validation uses features_v04_1.parquet
blockers.evidence: falcon_score.py loads features_v02, v040_fixed_validation.py loads features_v04_1
blockers.impact: Production scoring has 0% fundamental factor coverage for 2025-2026, validation has 98.9%
blockers.recommendation: Align data sources before deploying V0.4.0 to production

blockers.finding: Rank Inversion failure indicates model cannot distinguish good from bad stocks
blockers.evidence: 42.1% pass rate (8/19 windows), Top5% underperforms Bottom20% in 11/19 windows
blockers.impact: Even if WF Sharpe is good, the model's ranking ability is broken
blockers.recommendation: Do not use V0.4.0 for production. V0.3.1 has better rank inversion performance.

warnings.impact: Complex model adds no value over simple equal-weight strategy
warnings.recommendation: Consider reverting to V0.3.1 which has WF Sharpe 1.431 and better rank inversion

warnings.finding: V0.4.0 removes analyst factor which was 20% weight in V0.3.1
warnings.impact: Loss of analyst consensus information may reduce model performance
warnings.recommendation: Evaluate if analyst factor contributes positively to ranking

passes.finding: Feature computation pipeline is consistent
passes.evidence: Cross-sectional ranking computed correctly per date, factor groups properly defined

passes.finding: No evidence of data leakage in validation script
passes.evidence: No forward-looking columns, PIT consistency verified

passes.finding: Backtest engine properly handles costs and stop-loss
passes.evidence: cost=0.001, stop_loss=-0.15 applied correctly in Walk-Forward

overall_assessment.summary: V0.4.0 fails 3 out of 5 audit layers (Data Integrity, Model Validity, Signal Production, Cross-layer Consistency). Critical issues: (1) Rank Inversion failure (42.1% pass rate), (2) Model underperforms baseline, (3) Data source inconsistency between production and validation.
overall_assessment.recommendation: DO NOT deploy V0.4.0 to production. Revert to V0.3.1 (WF Sharpe=1.431, better rank inversion) until rank inversion issues are resolved.
critical_findings: Rank Inversion FAILED: 42.1% pass rate (8/19 windows)
Production scoring uses wrong data file (features_v02 vs features_v04_1)
